hidden_defect.condition: Single-cycle PAPER evidence was blocked correctly, but there was no dedicated function to safely aggregate multiple scoped PAPER/SHADOW evidence artifacts.
hidden_defect.impact: Profitability and optimizer review could remain stuck between single-cycle reports and scorecard fixtures, or operators could mistake fixture-based maturity for runtime-collected evidence.
hidden_defect.reproducibility: Confirmed by code inspection: shadow_runner built individual evidence reports and operational_cycle embedded one report; no accumulator module existed.
hidden_defect.fix: Added build_paper_shadow_evidence_accumulation_from_operation_reports with strict scope matching, PAPER-only blocking, and live/scale flag drift blocking.

remaining_gap.condition: No actual repeated SHADOW observation runtime stream is produced for the new accumulator to consume.
remaining_gap.impact: Long-run profitability evidence remains blocked and must not be represented as live review evidence.
remaining_gap.reproducibility: Confirmed by artifact and runtime scan during this turn.
remaining_gap.fix: Created PAPER_SHADOW_RUNTIME_SHADOW_OBSERVATION_GAP contract_gap; next safe task is SHADOW artifact production scaffold.
